name: Expired Pointer Dereference
description: The product dereferences a pointer that references memory that was previously valid but has been freed or released, potentially causing data corruption, information exposure, or code execution when the memory is reallocated for other use.
detection_pattern: STORAGE[memory] is released via TRANSFORM[free/release] but a pointer reference to that memory persists and is subsequently dereferenced without a CONTROL[lifetime_check] verifying the memory is still valid, enabling use-after-free conditions
